issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering enrollment in multiple workflow branches simultaneously, causing HAs and TCs to receive duplicate tasks. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the redundant tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters on March 9, 2026 to address this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was marked Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion. Madelaine updated the workflow to add re-enrollment criteria on March 16, 2026.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO reassignment
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the newly assigned one. The issue was identified as a product-side problem rather than a workflow configuration issue. Luis resolved the issue on March 13, 2026.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO changed during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reflect the correct LO and resend if necessary.

issues.title: TC workflow tasks not triggering for MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not enrolling into the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and believed the issue was resolved as of April 1, 2026. The root cause was not explicitly stated by HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1, 2026 that did not receive TC tasks.
